ship.name: Clydesdale Blockade Buster
ship.description: The colonists of Antlejos V have now had a wealth of experience running crucial supplies through a hostile blockade. This modification to the venerable Clydesdale was designed to be a better solution to that problem: by stripping a significant amount of armor and reorienting some of the maneuvering thrusters to supply additional forward thrust, it can reach speeds similar to those of a light cruiser... when travelling in a straight line.
